title: App crashes on login
description: Application throws a null pointer exception and crashes immediately when user taps login button

title: Server 500 error on checkout
description: Checkout API returns 500 internal server error intermittently under load

title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: Production database connection pool runs out under peak traffic causing timeouts

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Payment provider times out and transaction is not rolled back correctly

title: Memory leak in background worker
description: Worker process memory grows unbounded and eventually OOM kills the service

title: Data corruption in orders table
description: Concurrent writes cause order records to be partially overwritten

title: Authentication bypass vulnerability
description: Users can access another account's data by modifying the request token

title: SQL injection in search endpoint
description: Unsanitized input in search query allows arbitrary SQL execution

title: Session tokens not expiring
description: Expired sessions still authenticate successfully after logout

title: Button misaligned on mobile
description: Submit button overlaps with the footer on small screen widths

title: Typo in settings page
description: Settings page label says 'Prefrences' instead of 'Preferences'

title: Tooltip shows wrong text
description: Hover tooltip on the dashboard icon shows outdated helper text

title: Dark mode color inconsistency
description: Card background color does not match the rest of dark mode theme

title: Icon missing on empty state
description: Empty state illustration icon fails to load and shows broken image

title: Placeholder text cut off
description: Search bar placeholder text is truncated on narrower viewports

title: Slow page load on dashboard
description: Dashboard takes over 8 seconds to load with more than 500 records

title: Pagination breaks on filter change
description: Changing a filter resets pagination to page 1 unexpectedly, losing state

title: Export to CSV produces malformed file
description: CSV export includes broken line endings causing Excel import errors

title: Notifications delayed by hours
description: Push notifications arrive several hours after the triggering event

title: Search results out of date
description: Search index is not refreshed after a record update for up to 30 minutes

title: Form validation allows invalid email
description: Signup form accepts clearly invalid email formats without error

title: Chart rendering wrong values
description: Analytics dashboard chart displays incorrect aggregated totals

title: API returns wrong currency symbol
description: Localized currency symbol shown incorrectly for non-US locales

title: Duplicate entries in reports
description: Monthly report generator occasionally lists the same record twice

title: Login button unresponsive on Safari
description: Clicking login on Safari browser does nothing, no console error shown

title: Feature request: dark mode schedule
description: Users want dark mode to auto-switch based on system time

title: Feature request: bulk export
description: Users want to export multiple reports at once instead of one by one

title: Improve error message wording
description: Generic error messages are unhelpful and should describe the actual issue

title: Add loading spinner to save button
description: Save button gives no feedback while the request is in flight

title: Rename internal field label
description: Internal admin field label is inconsistent with new terminology

title: Crash on empty file upload
description: Uploading a zero-byte file crashes the upload service

title: Unauthorized admin panel access
description: Non-admin users can reach admin routes by guessing the URL

title: XSS in comment field
description: Comment field does not escape HTML allowing script injection

title: Race condition in inventory update
description: Concurrent purchases can oversell inventory due to a race condition

title: Timezone displayed incorrectly
description: Event times shown in UTC instead of the user's local timezone

title: Broken link in footer
description: Footer 'About Us' link points to a 404 page

title: Inconsistent spacing on cards
description: Card padding differs slightly between list and grid view

title: Slow API response for reports endpoint
description: Reports endpoint takes over 5 seconds on large date ranges

title: Password reset email not sent
description: Users report never receiving the password reset email

title: Two-factor code rejected incorrectly
description: Valid two-factor authentication codes are sometimes rejected

title: Log message misformatted in The webhook handler
description: the webhook handler writes a malformed log entry that breaks the standard log parser, though functionality is unaffected.

title: The background worker completely unresponsive in production
description: the background worker has been down for the last 20 minutes. Health checks are failing and no requests are succeeding.

title: Feature request: bulk export from The authentication service
description: Users want the ability to export multiple records from the authentication service at once instead of one at a time.

title: Intermittent failures in The user service
description: the user service fails roughly 1 in 20 requests with no clear pattern, requiring a manual retry.

title: Memory leak causes The webhook handler to OOM-kill
description: the webhook handler steadily consumes memory until the process is killed by the OS, roughly every 3 hours under normal load.

title: Missing authorization check on The audit log
description: the audit log does not verify the requesting user actually owns the resource being accessed.

title: The notification queue responds slowly under moderate load
description: the notification queue takes 5-8 seconds to respond once concurrent users pass a few hundred, well above our target latency.

title: The orders api returns 500 errors under load
description: During peak traffic, the orders API intermittently throws internal server errors and requests fail completely. This is affecting a large share of users right now.

title: Weak rate limiting on The password reset flow
description: the password reset flow allows far more requests per minute than intended, making brute-force attempts practical.

title: Sensitive fields logged in plaintext by The password reset flow
description: the password reset flow writes sensitive request fields to application logs without masking them.

title: Log message misformatted in The background worker
description: the background worker writes a malformed log entry that breaks the standard log parser, though functionality is unaffected.

title: The billing microservice response includes unused debug field
description: the billing microservice still includes a debug field in production responses that should have been stripped.

title: Icon missing on the comment section
description: An icon fails to load on the comment section and shows a broken image placeholder instead.

description: the file upload endpoint leaks other users' personal data in its response when queried with a modified ID parameter.
